name: @anirudhsengar/agentify
description: One terminal command for the full life of an agentic codebase: audit existing code, start greenfield projects, and export harness-native agent surfaces.
author: Anirudh Sengar

scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run test:generation-pipeline && npm run test:unit && bash tests/run.sh
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:all
scripts.test:parity: npm run build && npm run test:parity:cli && npm run test:parity:generated && npm run test:parity:state && npm run test:package
scripts.test:maintenance: tsx tests/maintenance/documentation-invariants.test.ts && tsx tests/maintenance/schema-boundaries.test.ts && tsx tests/maintenance/reachability-invariants.test.ts && tsx tests/maintenance/module-boundaries.test.ts && tsx tests/maintenance/legacy-state-consumers.test.ts && tsx tests/release-safety.test.ts
scripts.test:generated-output: tsx tests/artifacts-renderers.test.ts && tsx tests/generated-output-quality.test.ts && tsx tests/core/expert-outcome.test.ts && tsx tests/core/smoke-evidence.test.ts && tsx tests/core/release-qualification.test.ts
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:all && npm run test:package
